# Create environment
conda create -n aebm python=3.12
conda activate aebm

# Install dependencies
python -m pip install --upgrade pip
pip install torch torchvision --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130
pip install tensorboard tqdm scipy einops timm opencv-python pytorch-lightning omegaconf 
pip install torchdiffeq fairscale safetensors
pip install -e git+https://github.com/LTH14/torch-fidelity.git@master#egg=torch-fidelity

PROJECT_ROOT="/root/autodl-tmp"
IMAGENET_PATH="${PROJECT_ROOT}/datasets/imagenet/train"
CACHED_PATH="${PROJECT_ROOT}/datasets/imagenet/cached/vq-f8-n256"
VAE_PATH="${PROJECT_ROOT}/pretrained_models/vq-f8-n256"

mkdir -p $IMAGENET_PATH $CACHED_PATH $VAE_PATH
tar -xf archive.tar.gz -C $CACHED_PATH
unzip archive.zip -d $VAE_PATH

# Clone repo
cd [WORK_DIR]
git clone https://github.com/ljun0004/aebm.git

# Download pretrained vae model
cd [VAE_PATH]
wget -c https://ommer-lab.com/files/latent-diffusion/vq-f8-n256.zip
wget -c https://huggingface.co/jadechoghari/mar/resolve/main/kl16.safetensors
wget -c https://huggingface.co/shuidi0020/CODA/resolve/main/mar_v16384/vae_ema.pth
wget -c https://huggingface.co/shuidi0020/CODA/resolve/main/mar_v16384/quantizer_ema.pth

# Download dataset
cd [IMAGENET_PATH]
wget -c --no-check-certificate --user=YOUR_USERNAME --ask-password "https://image-net.org/data/ILSVRC/2012/ILSVRC2012_img_train.tar"
tar -xvf ILSVRC2012_img_train.tar --no-same-owner && rm -f ILSVRC2012_img_train.tar
find . -name "*.tar" | while read -r NAME; do DIR="${NAME%.tar}"; mkdir -p "$DIR"; tar -xvf "$NAME" -C "$DIR" --no-same-owner && rm -f "$NAME"; done

# Cache dataset (use cache_slurm.sh on HPC)
cd [WORK_DIR]
chmod +x cache.sh
./cache.sh

# Training (use train_slurm.sh on HPC)
cd [WORK_DIR]
chmod +x train.sh
./train.sh
